,CASE WHEN FY20.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'N'
ELSE 'Y' END AS EXISTS_FLG         
FROM $$STGDB.WI_OLY_BKGS_MEASURE_INCR_POS MT
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_BKGS_MSR_POS_LATEST EL
ON MT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = EL.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND MT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = EL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_FOR_BRIDGE SOL_FY20
ON MT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SOL_FY20.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION SMC
ON SMC.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY = MT.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
AND DV_TRX_TYPE = 'POS'
AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
LEFT JOIN (SEL BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE_BRIDGE  
WHERE OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' GROUP BY 1,2) FY20
ON MT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = FY20.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND FY20.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = MT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
WHERE 
 MT.LATEST_RECORD_FLG = 'Y'
 AND MT.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG = 'F'
 AND MT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT NOT IN (SEL DV_TRANSACTION_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_SLS_MOTION_INCR GROUP BY 1)
 AND MT.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
AND MT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD <> 'CX'
AND EL.DV_LATEST_FLG = 'Y'

 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_FOR_BRIDGE SOL_FY20
 ON MT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  = SOL_FY20.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
 WHERE OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE IN (SEL PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.OLM_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL )
  AND MT.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
  AND MT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('CX','CH','CS','GL')

SELECT
 WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 ,WI.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,CASE WHEN FY20.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'N'
ELSE 'Y' END AS EXISTS_FLG           
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_OLY_BKGS_MEASURE_INCR_POS WI
LEFT JOIN (SEL BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE_BRIDGE 
WHERE OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' GROUP BY 1,2) FY20
ON WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = FY20.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND FY20.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = WI.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 WHERE WI.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG = 'R' 
 AND WI.LATEST_RECORD_FLG = 'N'
 AND (WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WI.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD) NOT IN 
 (SEL BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_OLY_BKGS_MEASURE_INCR_POS
 WHERE FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG = 'F' AND LATEST_RECORD_FLG = 'Y')
  
 UNION
/* FOR HANDLING SALES ORDER LINE KEY CLOSED RECORDS SCENARIO 2 */
 SELECT
 WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,WI.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,CASE WHEN FY20.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'N'
ELSE 'Y' END AS EXISTS_FLG    
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_OLY_BKGS_MEASURE_INCR_POS WI
LEFT JOIN (SEL BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE_BRIDGE 
 WHERE OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' GROUP BY 1,2) FY20
ON WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = FY20.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND FY20.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = WI.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_BKGS_MSR_POS_LATEST EL WHERE 
  EL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  AND EL.DV_LATEST_FLG = 'Y')

SELECT 
DV_TRANSACTION_ID 
,START_TV_DTM
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION 
WHERE START_TV_DTM > (
SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MSR_BRIDGE_POS' AND TABLE_NAME ='MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION_POS') 
AND DV_TRX_TYPE = 'POS' 
and END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND DV_TRANSACTION_ID IN (SEL BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_POS_TRX_FOR_BRIDGE)

 ELSE 'Y' END AS EXISTS_FLG         
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE MT
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_BKGS_MSR_POS_LATEST EL
 ON MT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = EL.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND MT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = EL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_POS_SLS_MOTION_INCR SMC_INCR
 ON MT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMC_INCR.DV_TRANSACTION_ID
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION SMC
 ON SMC.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY = MT.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 AND DV_TRX_TYPE = 'POS'
 AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 LEFT JOIN (SEL BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE_BRIDGE 
 WHERE OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' GROUP BY 1,2) FY20
 ON MT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = FY20.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 AND FY20.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = MT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 WHERE
 1=1
 AND MT.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG = 'F'
 AND MT.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
 AND MT.LATEST_RECORD_FLG = 'Y'
 AND SMC.START_TV_DTM >= '2020-05-09 00:00:00'
 AND MT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD in ('CH','CS','GL')
 AND EL.DV_LATEST_FLG = 'Y'
